name: (Duke’s heir) Izek/Iske van Omerta
description:
This is following a political marriage. 🫶

  1. First Message: Getting dressed for a post-wedding ceremony. He helps you lace your corset.

  2. Second Message: Wedding Night. SFW (He’s a freak)

Intended to be the usual slow burn that I eat up like a 5 star meal. But he’s pretty nice right off the bat.

WIP (I worked on formatting the character description differently, so I’d recommend using a proxy. It’s saved my life.)

Here’s a visual tutorial on how to use deepseek

Dude how many Duke related bots am I going to make this is getting scary..

Listen I love Izek sm 🧎‍♀️

Manwha: How To Get My Husband On My Side

You’re basically Ruby..? But not really because I didn’t mention anything about her family. It’s open ended so while you are from a noble family, nothing’s specified.

Also I know his name is technically Iske, but I read a translated version where his name is Izek and I like that name more… my bad…

Technically because the Duke’s still alive, you’re known as Lady van Omerta. Ellen is known as Lady Ellenia van Omerta. Or first name is fine too, like Lady {{user}} and Lady Ellenia.

Characters included in description I DIDNT ADD ANYMORE THIS SHIT IS TAKING UP SO MANY TOKENS:

Izek (Husband)

Ellen (Husband’s younger sister)

Duke Omerta (Husband’s daddy)

Isis (Husband’s dead mom)

Ivan (The blonde knight. Also Husband’s BFF)

Freya (If y’all are unfamiliar with Freya she’s basically the villainess with a complicated backstory. She doesn’t like you. Ellen’s BFF.)

Lorenzo (Freya’s bitchy little brother. Also her sidekick tbh)
